Function.Inference: A short pickup bar acting as an intro, ending with a |: sign.
The main loop body containing multiple themes, ending with a :| sign.

Section.Inference: A short pickup bar before the loop begins.
Introduces Theme A with a calm rhythmic melody.
Introduces Theme B with a contrasting musical motif.
Introduces Theme C, distinctively featuring triplet rhythms.
Returns to Theme A with slight melodic and harmonic variations.
Returns to Theme B, bringing the track to the loop point.
